# kb-manifest Template

## Header

Write the generated date (YYYY-MM-DD) and version, such as v1.

## Architecture Overview

Write the four-layer order: capture -> cultivate -> connect -> create.

## Statistics Overview

Write key counts for each layer: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly notes, permanent notes, literature notes, topic notes, area pages, active projects, and archived projects.

## Topic Distribution

Write topic names and note counts.

## Area Distribution

Write area names and project or note counts.

## Recent Changes

Write the main changes from this index update.

## Pending Work

Write the next priority items.
